title: Verdant
description: Unique plants for a unique world.
body:
![Large banner stating "VERDANT".](https://i.imgur.com/9YTGlR2.png)
*Unique plants for a unique world.*
# What's Verdant?
Verdant fills your world with thoughtful, beautiful flora. Biomes gain much-needed additional identity, with jungles gaining a dense, rich underbrush, lush caves replacing simple grass with mossy sporophytes, and tundras getting bursts of color with dogwood and *i forget what else* If you want each part of your world to feel more vibrant and unique, Verdant is your mod.

### REQUIRES MOONLIGHT!

![Vine divider stating "COMPAT"](https://i.imgur.com/WyNpy6N.png)
Verdant has built-in compat for any biome mod that tags their biomes!

![vine divider by The Bobbu stating "features"](https://i.imgur.com/YnRxEo4.png)

New Groundcover:
 - **Barley**
 - **Clover**
 - **Dense Grass**
 - **Grass Edging**
 - **Weeds**
 - **Sporophyte**
 - **Jungle Fern**
 - **Dune Grass**
 - **Shrub**
New Plants
 - **Monstera**
 - **Ivy**
 - **Dogwood**
 - **Boxwood**
 - **Cattail**
 - **Duckweed**
 - **Sagebrush**
 - **Aloe Vera**
 - **Saguaro Cactus**
New Flowers
 - **Hibiscus**
 - **Anemone**
 - **Dahlia**
 - **Torch Lily**
 - **Grape Hyacinth**
 - **Salvia**
 - **Primrose**
	 - Hybridization
 - **Azalea Flowers**
	 - Flower Crown
New Mushrooms
 - **Button/Crimini/Portabella**
 - **Conk Fungus**
 - **Stinkhorn**
	 - Pale Stinkhorn
 - **Phosphor Fungus**
 - **Mushgloom**
 - **Milly Bubcap**
all mushrooms have large versions.

![Vine divider stating "CREDITS"](https://i.imgur.com/gpC2puj.png)

- [Ordana](https://modrinth.com/user/Ordana) for code, idea, and implementation.
- [The Bobbu](https://modrinth.com/user/Bobisnotaperson) for the icon, banner, and dividers.
- [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar) for invaluable code advice.
- [eldabys](https://modrinth.com/user/eldabys5) for project management and toad wrangling.
 
![Vine divider by the Bobbu](https://i.imgur.com/g3DorAO.png)

Please include in modpacks! if you do you can talk about it on our *discord*.
#### Verdant is best paired with:
[**![Would](https://i.imgur.com/YdPkWIv.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/would "Would") [**![Grounded](https://i.imgur.com/2RZegG8.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/grounded "Grounded") [**![Oxide](https://i.imgur.com/dFua2iK.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oxide "Oxide")
